subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Bear thou witness in thine inmost heart that verily there is none other God but Him, and that He Who appeared bearing the name of Ali before Nabil, verily He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی ان اشهد فی نفسک بانه لا اله الا هو و ان الذی ظهر باسم علی قبل نبیل انه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @station of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
